Explanation: The game was getting review bombed by people complaining they slowed down the movement, when they in fact didn't, they just reset the FOV to 70, but you could just change it back to your preferred FOV. And the other people review bombing were complaining they didn't have servers in their region, when they actually did, the game just falsely reported not having it (The game didn't show Oceania servers, but Oceania servers were in the game and people were playing on them already).

It is one of the most fun games ever at its core, but the dev team continuously proves they have no idea what to do with that. It's a great casual game that once had an unbalanced yet playable (and very fun) ranked mode. It is now just "Play medium or you are absolutely screwed if you face any decent team." The dev team doesn't understand how to fundamentally design an FPS. They have a class system. Первая игра на UE5, которая не тормозит на любом железе, как полудохлая скотина. Другими словами - один из лучших мультиплеерных проектов за последние годы.

在未來，當考古學家們在層層荒漠下挖掘時，某款遊戲隨著黃土的移動，露出了早已退色但依然保存完好的一角，映入了一旁的老學究和他的助手眼眸。

實驗室裡，人們交頭接耳的講述這個新發現的遊戲，從內容看來，他和當時的其他遊戲差別並不大，彩糖般鮮豔的色彩、多名玩家合作的競爭要素、三次元運動的射擊體驗、強調分工和技能的多面搭配。人們早已對這些習以為常，甚至開始有些厭煩了，認為這不過又是另一款新瓶裝舊酒的短線遊戲。但大夥還是拎起職業的態度，開始討論起了遊戲的歸宿。

「憑藉這些破壞要素，這款遊戲應該被歸類在BF的子條目下。」一位帶著墨鏡和軍帽的胖老哥自信得說。

「不不不。這款遊戲的人數很明顯要少得多，依我看應該放在COD那才對。」另一位年紀輕輕的研究員說，摸摸他稀疏的鬍子，深怕別人知道他才十六歲而已。

「要我說，我覺得這款遊戲是UBI做的，你們看他那伺服器，簡直是同個機房弄出來的。」帶著學術氣息的高挑男人說，穿著那套一年三百六十五天同款的外套和T恤。

「說不定像overwatch。」頂著禿頭的亞裔男子插嘴到，但大家只是大笑了幾聲。一旁TF2的主任就把他攆走了。

「我覺得到像Fortnite。」建築部門那位頂著七彩長髮的老哥路過門前說到。但幾人均不予理會。

「這幾款遊戲不都一樣嗎？」一旁新來的秘書看著幾人，脫口說了最不該說的話。

這幾人本就是各自領域的專家，自然不會讓人把自己跟他們混為一談，要是在平常，這幾人巴不得跟對方揪起嘴來吵個沒完，但一看到講這話的人不過是個女人，便開始爭相恐嚇的在她面前解釋了起來。

「COD跟BF才不一樣，COD都是小孩子玩的，真正的玩家才會玩BF。」那位胖老哥直指著年輕人說。

那年輕人不該示弱回答。「你也不看看BF都幾年沒出續作了，最新作看來簡直就是COD的翻版罷的。」說完拍了拍胖老哥的肚腩。

So my son wouldn’t stop talking about this game — I’ll call it "Whatever-the-Kids-Are-Playing-Now 3000." You know, the one where everyone yells into microphones and spends real money on imaginary pants. I decided, as a responsible parent, to play it myself. For “bonding.” For “connection.” For “research.”

Five minutes in, my son went from proud teacher to full-blown military commander. “MOM, DON’T PRESS THAT!” “MOM, YOU’RE EXPOSING OUR POSITION!” I wasn’t sure if we were gaming or reenacting basic training.

But somewhere between his dramatic sighs and my accidental self-destructions, I got it — this isn’t just a game to him. It’s his little world of chaos, friends, and joy. And for a few hours, I got to be part of it. Even if I was the weakest link.

1)Ивенты и награды за них. В этой игре нет проблем с визуальным БЕСПЛАТНЫМ контентом, его просто куча. THE FINALS offers a unique twist on the first-person shooter genre, blending intense combat with a dynamic, game-show-inspired setting. Developed by Embark Studios, the game delivers a fresh multiplayer experience that emphasizes environmental destruction and strategic gameplay.

At its core, THE FINALS is a team-based shooter where squads of three compete in various modes, primarily focusing on securing and defending cashouts. The standout feature is the fully destructible environments, allowing players to alter the battlefield in real-time, creating new paths or eliminating cover . This mechanic adds a layer of strategy, as players must adapt to the ever-changing landscape.

I am almost level 100 with around 9,000 kills, playing fairly and consistently. At the same time, there are players at a similar level who have over 30,000 kills, which is extremely suspicious and should raise serious concerns. The difference is far too large to be explained by skill or playtime alone.
